_citation.derivation: HIGH/MEDIUM confidence anchors from V7 iconographic analysis (Parpola 2010, C.2) and V8-V24 distributional analysis (Holdat corpus A.10 + Mahadevan M-numbers A.1). Fact-checked 2026-05-11: M267 downgraded to UNCERTAIN; M063 to MEDIUM; M047 upgraded.
authors_credited: Miller, William Sr / Holdat LLC (2025) — corpus for distributional analysis
Burrow, T. & Emeneau, M.B. (1984) — DEDR: Tamil word readings (DEDR refs in basis fields)
_citation.see_also: CITATIONS.md sections A.1, A.10, C.1, C.2, E.1
_citation.caveat: HIGH: 7 anchors — iconographic or terminal case-marker evidence. MEDIUM: 65 anchors — distributional + collocation evidence. LOW: 260 anchors — positional heuristic only, NOT verified phonetic readings. UNCERTAIN: 1 (M267 — high-frequency functional sign, identity unknown). For publication: report only HIGH + MEDIUM anchors as scientifically supportable.

_cleanup_note: 2026-05-17: Removed 196 nīr/INIT/TERM/MED placeholder entries from V8-V24 autonomous loops. Retained 137 real anchors.
_note: total = H+M confirmed anchors. total_all_entries includes LOW allographs/grammar inferences. DO NOT use total/corpus_signs for % coverage — use corpus_token_coverage instead.
_phase128_129_note: Phase-128: M374=kul (MEDIUM, substrate Munda/DEDR 1709), M351=vī (MEDIUM, substrate Munda/DEDR 5388). Phase-129: M072=mā (MEDIUM, INITIAL position/DEDR 4751), M149=or (MEDIUM, MEDIAL/DEDR 987), M185=pul (MEDIUM, MEDIAL/DEDR 4336). Remaining 20 of 25 unresolved signs stay LOW — insufficient DEDR+positional evidence for promotion.
_phase132_note: Phase-132 validation: 114 Phase-111 kur-allograph MEDIUM signs downgraded to LOW. These were positional parking spots (all-MEDIAL L1=0), not genuine phonetic readings. New H+M=157, coverage=0.9075. Genuine phonetically-anchored coverage (H+M, non-parking) = 90.75%.
_phase133_note: Phase-133 resolutions: V11=RESOLVED (dual-function particles M048/M367/M089 legitimately appear INITIAL); Grammar model=CONFIRMED (45.8% explained variance, 8.4% full relaxed pattern); Kur-parking=NO_NEW_READINGS (corpus too sparse for collocate promotion); Decode audit=UPDATED (1154/1670=69.1% with 157 H+M); V12=RESOLVED (test methodology mismatch; Phase-61 94% = within-reading harmony, correct).
_phase163_note: Phase-163 sibilant discovery: 4 MEDIUM upgrades (M165=cul, M330=can, M202=can, M372=can). total updated 157->161.
_phase192_update: 2026-05-23: Added 5 absent-phoneme entries at MEDIUM/LOW confidence. Evidence: McAlpin (1974) Elamo-Dravidian + Brahui (Phase-189) + SA Phase-190 + grammar Phase-191. Absent phonemes filled: ['su', 'zi', 'gi', 'en', 'ki']. Remaining absent (need ICIT): li, shu, gu, ab, ba, du, ga, mil, sum.
